title: Questions from Quarantine: Safe Sending Kids to Summer Camp?
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. Questions from Quarantine: Safe Sending Kids to Summer Camp? result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to provide advice on managing life during a global crisis, specifically addressing public concerns such as the safety of sending children to summer camp during the pandemic. It encourages audience participation by inviting questions via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The content is presented as part of the Security and Global Health Project, focusing on practical guidance for maintaining sanity and hygiene. The body references related expert analyses on topics like mega-event safety, supply chain management, and potential migration crises, positioning the series within broader discussions of global health and security policy.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在为全球危机期间的生活管理提供建议，特别回应了公众关切，例如在疫情期间送孩子参加夏令营是否安全。文章鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提问。该内容作为“安全与全球健康项目”的一部分，侧重于提供保持理智和卫生的实用指导。正文还提及了相关专家分析，涉及大型活动安全、供应链管理以及潜在移民危机等主题，将该系列置于更广泛的全球健康与安全政策讨论之中。
